block_01: Win a dream trip to Thailand 🌴
block_03: Get ready to celebrate a decade of success with IQ Option like never before! We’re announcing an unforgettable party dedicated to IQ’s 10-year-anniversary!
block_09: This exclusive event promises to be a night to remember. Get ready for a rooftop party with groovy vibes, a live DJ, food & drinks, and a variety of shows. 🔥You will receive memorable gifts, network with other top affiliates and make productive connections with our top-level management team to discuss any possible questions or concerns, scale up your work and find ways to improve our partnership even further.
block_10: We’d like to remind you that our affiliate contest is in full swing! Any affiliate who shows good results and performs better than they did last month will be eligible to win amazing prizes, one of which is a fully-paid trip to Bangkok! Don’t waste any time – message your manager to participate!
block_12: Partying with us is always a memorable experience! If you’re having any doubts, take a look at these pictures from Exnova affiliate party – it was an absolute BLAST and the energy was off the charts! 🎉
